subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden and My leaf! The people of Iran, for the most part, are deprived of truth and barred from the realm of mystic knowledge and vision [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امتی و یا ورقتی خلق ایران اکثری از حق محروم و از عالم مکاشفه و شهود ممنوع
subcodes.subjects: @corruption and decline of Islam; of the Shi'ih, @power of prayer
